ddls:
CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "accession" TEXT /* Accession number for the query */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the query */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the query */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., FASTA, GenBank, PDB) */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the query was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the query (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library */,
  "library_release" TEXT /* Release version of the library */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the library (e.g., genomic, proteomic) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the library (e.g., public database, internal) */,
  "date_released" TEXT /* Date when the library was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_library" (
  "query_id" TEXT /* ID of the query */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library */,
  "start_end" TEXT /* Start and end positions of the query in the library */,
  "date_linked" TEXT /* Date when the query was linked to the library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id", "library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome on which the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand (e.g., +, -) */,
  "functional_annotation" TEXT /* Functional annotation of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "protein_description" TEXT /* Description of the protein */,
  "protein_sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "structure_file" TEXT /* File path of the protein structure (e.g., PDB file) */,
  "functional_annotation" TEXT /* Functional annotation of the protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_gene" (
  "query_id" TEXT /* ID of the query */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "date_linked" TEXT /* Date when the query was linked to the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id", "gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lead_researcher" TEXT /* Name of the lead researcher */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)
column_names: Format of the data (e.g., FASTA, GenBank, PDB)
